prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组最低位次分别为约572名、670名、879名、1493名、1150名，整体呈明显后移趋势。2024年大幅后移至1493名（历史最大），2025年回弹至1150名，近3年累计后移约578名，2025年基准位次约1150名；该校在内蒙古理科组招生计划：2021年24人（理科）、2022年29人、2023年29人、2024年27人、2025年30人（物理类），2026年计划缩至23人，较2025年缩招约23.3%，缩招幅度较大，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科2026年排名第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定，属于全国顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第26位（较热），综合热度约180万。2022年因土木工程专业在河南断档引发明显负面舆情（22条负面事件），2025年仍有投档线暴跌相关负面信号，土木建筑类专业的社会信心持续走低，可能对理科组整体报考热度产生一定压制；土木工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、城乡规划学A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A、交通运输工程A等，工科实力全国顶尖。但土木建筑类专业社会热度明显劝退，计算机/电子信息类专业高热推荐，专业冷热分化显著。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类、电气工程类专业高热推荐；土木建筑类明显劝退，与同济传统王牌专业（土木、建筑）形成反差，可能影响整体报考热度。内蒙古2026年物理类考生估算约11.1万，较2025年（约8.4万）增长约32.3%，竞争显著加剧；同济大学位于上海，对内蒙古考生吸引力强；该校在内蒙古理科组招生占比约0.8%-1.3%，属于外省招生中的较小份额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1150名、2026年大幅缩招约23.3%、内蒙古考生大幅增加约32.3%以及土木建筑类专业社会热度持续走低，预计2026年理科组最低录取位次将较2025年明显前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约939名，区间826–1052名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（826-1052名）内建议以二档专业为主攻方向（理科试验班、临床医学），一档专业（国豪精英班、卓越计划班、信息类）作为冲刺，三档医学试验班作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<826名）可重点冲刺一档王牌工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 572, 670, 879, 1493, and 1150, showing a clear overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly moved back to 1493 (historical maximum), rebounding to 1150 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 578 places over the past 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1150. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science group: 24 in 2021 (science), 29 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 30 in 2025 (physics category), and the 2026 plan is reduced to 23, a decrease of about 23.3% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking (Top 20), with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top engineering powerhouse in the country. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents, but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.8 million. In 2022, the civil engineering major experienced a significant negative public opinion due to a gap in Henan (22 negative incidents), and in 2025, there were still negative signals related to a sharp drop in the admission score line. Social confidence in civil engineering and architecture majors continues to decline, which may suppress the overall application enthusiasm for the science group to some extent. Civil Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Transportation Engineering A+, etc., with top engineering strength nationwide. However, the social popularity of civil engineering and architecture majors is clearly discouraging, while computer/electronic information majors are highly recommended, showing significant polarization between hot and cold majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering majors are highly recommended; civil engineering and architecture majors are clearly discouraged, contrasting with Tongji's traditional flagship majors (civil engineering, architecture), which may affect overall application enthusiasm. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia for 2026 is about 111,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (about 84,000), significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment share in Inner Mongolia's science group is about 0.8%-1.3%, a relatively small portion among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1150, a significant enrollment reduction of about 23.3% in 2026, a substantial increase in Inner Mongolia candidates of about 32.3%, and the continued decline in social popularity of civil engineering and architecture majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will significantly move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 939, with a range of 826–1052.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information/Computer and Electronics Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical)
- Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (826-1052), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Science Experimental Class, Clinical Medicine) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Guohao Elite Class, Excellence Plan Class, Information Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<826), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 181, 197, 213, 279, and 190, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 279, and in 2025, it rebounded notably to 190, with a large fluctuation range of about 89 positions in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 190. The enrollment plan for Tongji University in Inner Mongolia's liberal arts group: from 2021 to 2024, it was consistently 15 (liberal arts), adjusted to 11 (history category) in 2025, and increased to 12 in 2026, an expansion of about 9% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 18th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14-18 range in recent years, making it a top-tier national university. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (such as paper data fabrication), but overall attention is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.8 million, indicating mid-to-upper level exposure on short video platforms and moderate application attention. From 2022 to 2023, there was significant negative public opinion due to a gap in the civil engineering major in Henan, but the impact has gradually dissipated. It has A+ disciplines in Civil Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, A in Architecture, Computer Science and Technology, and Transportation Engineering, with 17 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended by society, while civil architecture majors are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (about 116,000). Among them, the liberal arts group (history category) is estimated to have about 43,000 candidates, significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%-2.4%, a relatively small share among out-of-province enrollments, with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 190 in 2025, an enrollment expansion of about 9% in 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolian candidates, and the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier status, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 210, with a range of 160–260.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<160), one can aim for Tier 1 majors.
